name: Melffy Pinny
name_jp: メルフィー・ラッシィ
desc: If a face-up Beast monster you control was returned to the hand this turn, except "Melffy Pinny" (Quick Effect): You can Special Summon this card from your hand, then immediately after this effect resolves, Synchro Summon 1 Synchro Monster using only this card you control and "Melffy" monsters in your hand. During your End Phase, if this card is in your GY: You can target 1 Beast Xyz Monster you control; attach this card to it as material. You can only use each effect of "Melffy Pinny" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If a face-up Beast monster you control was returned to the hand this turn, except "Melffy Pinny" (Quick Effect): You can Special Summon this card from your hand, then immediately after this effect resolves, Synchro Summon 1 Synchro Monster using only this card you control and "Melffy" monsters in your hand. During your End Phase, if this card is in your GY: You can target 1 Beast Xyz Monster you control; attach this card to it as material. You can only use each effect of "Melffy Pinny" once per turn.
eff: If a face-up Beast monster you control was returned to the hand this turn, except "Melffy Pinny" (Quick Effect): You can Special Summon this card from your hand, then immediately after this effect resolves, Synchro Summon 1 Synchro Monster using only this card you control and "Melffy" monsters in your hand. During your End Phase, if this card is in your GY: You can target 1 Beast Xyz Monster you control; attach this card to it as material. You can only use each effect of "Melffy Pinny" once per turn.

sets.set: 25th Anniversary Tin: Dueling Heroes Mega Pack

action: Uses itself as a Synchro Material
Uses cards in the hand as Synchro Materials
Can only use certain Synchro Materials
Attaches itself from your Graveyard as Xyz Material
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
Special Summons from your Extra Deck
misc: Requires control of specific Monster card type
